title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Kinemon as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's just that they're...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: GRRR...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Quite strong

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: have been

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you did well to corner those salong users this much

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: tend to your wounds and come back you've done enough...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Because of their ruling

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We've got quite a lot of casualties

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I express my utmost gratitude to the MINK Warriors

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: WOR ORO- RO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Prepare to run until you die

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's see just how many blasts you can evade

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: "Blast breath"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I never even thought about it

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: "Cleaving of flames"!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: "Foxfire style"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Run away? Don't make us laugh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are already tired of running!! Tired of HIDING!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As Lord Oden's Samura!!!! Let us die already!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: While bringing you down with us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They express their hearts with their swords...

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 21 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
